status.goal: Full song 2-3 min for streaming; 45-90s excerpt for vertical edit
status.targetDuration: 2-3 minutes (full); excerpt for short vertical video

fields.title: Rainbow Bibimbap
fields.styleOfMusic: K-pop electronic pop with crisp four-on-the-floor kicks, rubbery synth bass, playful staccato percussion, bright glossy chorus, tiny bell sparkles, short vocal-chop answers, clean punchy mix, wide neon sheen, close-mic lead vocals, quick pre-chorus lift, candy-bright hook that can loop cleanly for short video edits., k-pop, pop, electronic
fields.excludeStyles: No aggressive rap, no metal, no heavy rock, no children's choir, no advertising-style spoken voice, no voice-over narration, no real artist reference, no brand names, no Korean-language imitation, no recipe tutorial lyrics, no ingredient counting, no software names, no social media callouts.
fields.autoLyricsPrompt:
Write original English song lyrics about a joyful unicorn kitchen mascot making Korean bibimbap. Use only lyrics and section tags; do not explain the prompt. Do not include genre, production, instrument, mix, or vocal-style instructions. Do not write a recipe tutorial, quantities, numbered steps, brand names, software names, or social media references.

Mood: bright, glossy, playful, savory-sweet, colorful, food-video ASMR energy, but not childish.

Lyric style: short singable lines, clipped phrasing, catchy repetitions, call-and-response energy, simple hooks, occasional parenthetical echoes like "(bibimbap)". Keep the chorus reusable for a 45-90 second video edit.

Story and imagery to weave in naturally:
- golden yolk breaking and running into white rice
- sesame shine, chili gloss, tiny white seeds
- soft steam rising from rice grains
- beef strips sizzling in a dark soy-sesame glaze
- green, orange, white, brown, and yellow colors arranged like a rainbow bowl
- a spoon folding one glossy bite without turning it into a tutorial
- final hero bowl in a warm kitchen with a proud unicorn smile

Must include naturally: bibimbap, unicorn, sesame, chili shine, golden yolk, rice cloud, rainbow bowl, sizzle, one bright bite.

Structure:
[Verse 1]
Yolk, rice cloud, sesame sparkle, chili shine, the first glossy hook.

[Pre-Chorus]
Colors gather in the bowl; build anticipation around the sizzle and steam.

[Chorus]
Big chantable hook around unicorn + bibimbap + rainbow bowl + one bright bite. Repeat "bibimbap" as a hook.

[Verse 2]
Beef glaze, carrot glow, greens, steam, seeds, and the bowl coming together.

[Bridge]
Softer moment: spoon dips in, yolk and sauce turn the rice gold.

[Final Chorus]
Repeat the chorus with extra energy and end on the proud unicorn and the shining bowl.
fields.shortVersionPlan: For a 45-90 second vertical edit, use a very short intro or immediate Verse 1 line over the yolk-break hook, keep the pre-chorus for the beef sizzle and vegetable color build, land the full chorus on radial assembly, sauce pour, yolk break payoff, and final hero bowl. If the bridge has a softer spoon-dip image, use 2-4 seconds of it before the final chorus over the satisfied Licorn ending.

instructions.voice: Use a bright, close-mic pop vocal persona if available. Do not request imitation of any real singer or protected voice.
instructions.structure: Generate the long version first, aiming for 2-3 minutes, with a chorus that can be lifted cleanly for a 45-90 second vertical cut.
instructions.workflowNotes: Suno is manual. Do not generate music from this workspace. Keep lyrics image-driven, not procedural.

qualityChecks: Title is set before style and lyrics in Suno.
Style of Music contains only musical direction, no lyric instructions.
Auto Lyrics Prompt is English, under 3000 characters, and contains no recipe tutorial wording.
No real artists, brands, protected voices, software names, or social media calls.
Short version plan aligns with yolk hook, beef sizzle, radial assembly, and final hero bowl.
